title: SoulForgeAdditions
body:
A mod that add improvements and fixes to [SoulForge](https://modrinth.com/mod/soulforge).

# Features

Currently, this mod:

- Adds more information about abilities in tooltips
- Displays currently selected ability in the same matter as item slots in hotbar (sometimes bugs out) (2.2.1 and below)
- Fades away magic meter if not used
- Fixes incompatibility with AppleSkin (2.0.6 and below)

For the planned list of features, check out the [TODO list](https://github.com/5GameMaker/SoulForgeAdditions/blob/master/TODO.md).

# Installation

This mod is installed like any other mod by downloading a jar and putting it into your `mods` folder.

It's important to use an appropriate version of SFA for your version of SoulForge:

| SoulForge | SoulForge Additions |
|-----------|---------------------|
| 2.0.5     | 0.2                 |
| 2.0.6     | 0.3                 |
| 2.0.7     | 0.4                 |
| 2.0.8     | 0.5                 |
| 2.0.9     | 0.7                 |
| 2.1.0     | 0.8                 |
| 2.1.1     | 0.9                 |
| 2.2.1     | 0.10                |
| 2.6.0     | 0.11                |
| 2.6.1     | 0.12                |
| 2.6.2     | 0.14                |
| 2.6.5     | 0.16                |
| 2.6.6     | 0.18                |

Versions below are not supported and above that are not listed are WIP.

# Use in modpacks

This mod can be freely used in modpacks.

Attribution recommended, but not required.

# Incompatibilities

- Any mod that changes how item name overlay is rendered, since we override that feature.
